description: You are an audio software engineer at a podcast hosting platform. The core audio processing library `audio_core` located at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/audio_core` has three reported bugs: stereo files reporting incorrect durations, a noise reduction filter that crashes or produces silence, and inconsistent loudness normalization. Fix these issues in `audio_processor/utils.py`, `audio_processor/filters.py`, and `audio_processor/loudness.py` until all tests in the provided test suite pass. Do not modify the test files.
